title: output of port grouping in ps command added as example
body:
example added in man page as suggested in review  https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/2664#pullrequestreview-215007446

Signed-off-by: Kunal Kushwaha <kushwaha_kunal_v7@lab.ntt.co.jp>

comments.body:
Can one of the admins verify this patch?
I understand the following commands:
- `bot, add author to whitelist`
- `bot, test pull request`
- `bot, test pull request once`
LGTM, thanks for circling back on this @kunalkushwaha !
Ugh, our "old friend" rootless_test failures are back today.  Test failures are not related to this PR.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *kunalkushwaha*, *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
I'm pretty sure test failures are fixed upstream - you might want to rebase?
